title: Wiring evidence below gate threshold
description: Add a wiring evidence entry with a score below the gate threshold

mutation.description: Lower wiring evidence score below threshold

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect L1->L2 alignment score below gate

title: Low purpose alignment score
description: Create a requirement-purpose mapping with low alignment score

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect L2->L3 low alignment score

title: Corrupted traceability matrix status
description: Set traceability matrix status to broken to indicate data corruption

mutation.description: Set status field to 'broken' to indicate corrupted traceability data

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect L3->TC traceability corruption via status field

title: Removed wiring entry entirely
description: Remove a wiring entry entirely, dropping alignment score to zero

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect missing wiring evidence

title: Good L1->L2 but tanked L2->L3
description: Create perfect L1->L2 score but intentionally lower L2->L3 — partial alignment gap

mutation.description: Set all L2->L3 alignment scores low while keeping L1->L2 intact

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect L2->L3 failure while L1->L2 passes

title: Correct evidence but wrong purpose classification
description: Add a wiring entry with correct evidence but wrong purpose classification

mutation.description: Change purpose classification to wrong value

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect misclassified wiring purpose

title: Corrupted traceability matrix structure
description: Replace traceability matrix with corrupted non-array structure

mutation.description: Set matrix field to a string to break the expected array structure

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect corrupted traceability matrix structure

title: Two requirements mapping to same evidence with different purposes
description: Create a wiring conflict where two requirements map to the same evidence with different purposes

mutation.description: Add duplicate evidence mapping with conflicting purpose

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect evidence mapping conflict

title: All gates pass individually but fail end-to-end
description: Create an alignment chain that passes all gates individually but fails end-to-end consistency

mutation.description: Create subtle inconsistencies that pass individual gate checks

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect end-to-end alignment inconsistency

title: Gate check order inversion
description: Flip the order of gate checks (L3 before L1) and verify solver detects the inversion

mutation.description: Invert gate check order in manifest

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect incorrect gate ordering
